meta.title: Dalia's Corner — A Little Corner of Love
meta.description: Little handmade, hand-painted characters, each carefully planted and full of personality. No two are ever exactly alike.

hero.subheadline: Every character starts in our hands. We shape it, paint it, and carefully plant it before sending it off to a new home.
hero.supporting: Small in size. Big in presence. 🌿

promo.aria: Offers: up to 20% off until 15 August, and free delivery on orders over 2,000 EGP

about.title: Our *Story*
about.body: It all started with Mama Dalia, her love for plants, and her love for making things by hand. That's how Dalia's Corner was born. We're a small family creating every character together, shaping, painting, and planting each one by hand before it finds a new home. Because everything is handmade, every character has its own little details and personality.

characters.title: Meet the *Characters*
characters.intro: Each character has its own little personality and story. Take your time—you might find one that feels just like you.

why.title: Why *Dalia's Corner*?
points: Every character is handmade and hand-painted with care.
Every one is unique—no two are exactly alike.
Arrives carefully planted with a care card included.
Packed with care to arrive safely.

order.title: How to *Order*
order.primaryBody: Add your favorite character to the cart and send your order. It comes straight to us on WhatsApp, where we'll confirm the details and delivery.
order.altBody: See a character you love? Send us its name or a screenshot on Instagram or WhatsApp, and we'll take care of the rest.

items.a: We currently deliver across Cairo & Giza. Delivery cost and timing depend on your area, and we'll confirm everything before your order is dispatched.
Nope. Everything is painted by hand, so there are always small differences between pieces. That's the fun of it: yours is the only one like it.

items.q: Can I request a character in a specific color or design?
items.a: Message us on Instagram or WhatsApp with what you have in mind, and we'll see what we can do.

items.q: Do the plants come with the planters?
items.a: Yes! Every planter arrives with a succulent already in it, plus a little card that tells you how to keep it happy. They're tough plants, honestly hard to kill.

footer.madeWith: Dalia's Corner — Made with love in Egypt

consent.title: A quick word about tracking
consent.body: We'd like to use the Meta (Facebook) Pixel to see which of our posts and ads actually bring people to the shop. Nothing loads unless you say yes, and you can change your mind whenever you like.

product.sizeNote: About {cm} cm tall, shaped from clay and painted by hand. Yours won't look exactly like anyone else's, and that's the point.
product.includedNote: Every planter comes with a succulent already in it, plus a little card on how to keep it happy.
product.deliveryNote: Cost and timing depend on your area. We'll confirm everything with you in chat before your order heads out.

privacy.title: Privacy & tracking
privacy.intro: Dalia's Corner is a small family pottery studio in Cairo. This page is the plain, honest version of what happens to your information when you visit the site or place an order.
privacy.contactTitle: Questions, or want your data deleted?
privacy.contactBody: Message us on WhatsApp or Instagram and we'll sort it out. It's just us running this place, so the person reading your message is the same person who can actually fix things.

sections.p: Dalia's Corner, a family business based in Cairo, Egypt, is the data controller for this website. That's the legal term for the ones answerable for your data. You can reach us any time on WhatsApp or on Instagram at @bydaliascorner.

sections.h: Your cart stays in your browser
sections.p: When you add characters to the cart and type in your name, phone number, and address, all of it is saved in your own browser's local storage and nowhere else. This whole site is a set of static files. There's no server behind it and no database, so we simply can't see what you typed until you choose to send it to us.
items: Your cart and delivery details never leave your device on their own.
When you tap "Order on WhatsApp", your browser opens WhatsApp with the order already written out. You're the one who hits send, not us.
For Instagram, the same text is copied to your clipboard so you can paste it into a message.
Clear your browser data and all of it is gone.

sections.h: The Meta Pixel, only if you say yes
sections.p: If you accept tracking, we load the Meta Pixel from Meta Platforms. It shows us which posts and ads actually bring people to the shop, which is genuinely useful for a small business to know. If you decline, or just ignore the banner, the Pixel never loads and not a single request goes to Meta. When it is on, here's what it collects:
items: The pages you visit, the characters you look at, what you add to your cart, and when you start checking out.
A random ID stored in your browser so Meta can tell one visit apart from another. It isn't based on anything about you personally.
Two cookies called _fbp and _fbc, which Meta sets after you agree.

sections.h: What we send when you check out
sections.p: If, and only if, you've accepted tracking, then the moment you tap the WhatsApp or Instagram checkout button we send Meta a scrambled (SHA-256 hashed) version of the name and phone number you entered, along with the city (Cairo) and country (Egypt). The scrambling happens on your own device, so your real name and number never leave it. Meta uses this to work out whether you'd seen one of our ads. You can switch it off at any time, and ordering works just fine without it.
Meta processes this data outside Egypt, including in Ireland and the United States. If you'd rather it didn't, decline tracking. The shop works exactly the same either way.

sections.h: Your consent, and taking it back
sections.p: The only reason we load the Pixel is that you said yes. If you change your mind, use the "Tracking settings" link at the bottom of any page. Withdrawing stops any further data from being sent and clears Meta's cookies from your browser.

When your order moves into WhatsApp or Instagram Direct, that conversation is covered by Meta's own privacy policy as well as this one. We keep your order details, meaning your name, phone number, and address, for as long as we need them to deliver your order and help if something goes wrong. After that, we delete them.

Under Egypt's Personal Data Protection Law (Law 151 of 2020), you can ask us what we hold about you, have it corrected or erased, withdraw your consent, or object to how we use it. One message is all it takes. You also have the right to complain to Egypt's Personal Data Protection Center.
If we change how any of this works, we'll update this page and the date at the top. If it's a big change, we'll ask for your consent all over again.
